fields.Title: Maximum Subarray
fields.Pattern: Kadane's recurrence as a scan: each cell is the best subarray sum ending here.
fields.Invariant: At each element, bestEndingHere is the maximum sum of a subarray ending exactly at that element; the final answer is the maximum scanned state.
fields.Code:
maxSubarray = maximum . scanl1 step
  where
    step bestEndingHere x = max x (bestEndingHere + x)
fields.Complexity: Time: O(n). Space: O(n) for the scanned list; can be O(1) with the tuple-fold version.
fields.Pitfall(s): Do not seed the recurrence with 0 for LeetCode's nonempty input, or all-negative arrays incorrectly return 0.
